subject: [PATCH v3 3/4] elf: align ET_DYN base for PTE coalescing and PMD mapping

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the alignment strategy and suggested considering other architectures' requirements. Asked for clarification on how the new alignment logic interacts with existing code.

2026-04-02.patch_summary: This patch addresses a virtual address alignment issue for PIE binaries (ET_DYN) on arm64, which prevents hardware PTE coalescing and PMD mappings for large folios. It extends the maximum_alignment() function to consider two tiers of alignment: HPAGE_PMD_SIZE for PMD mapping and exec_folio_order() for hardware TLB coalescing.
